name.description: The resource name of the Feature Group.

labels.description: The labels with user-defined metadata to organize your FeatureGroup. **Note**: This field is non-authoritative, and will only manage the labels present in your configuration. Please refer to the field `effective_labels` for all of the labels present on the resource.

big_query.description: Indicates that features for this group come from BigQuery Table/View. By default treats the source as a sparse time series source, which is required to have an entityId and a feature_timestamp column in the source. Structure is [documented below](#nested_big_query).

big_query_source.description: The BigQuery source URI that points to either a BigQuery Table or View. Structure is [documented below](#nested_big_query_big_query_source).

entity_id_columns.description: Columns to construct entityId / row keys. If not provided defaults to entityId.

region.description: The region of feature group. eg us-central1

project.description: If it is not provided, the provider project is used.

input_uri.description: BigQuery URI to a table, up to 2000 characters long. For example: `bq://projectId.bqDatasetId.bqTableId.`
